summary: Brief 5‑star review noting the recording hasn’t been uploaded yet; no details on sound or performance
review: The only fan comment is a short note that this particular file has not been released (“Has not been upped yet”) and points to another set‑2 file. While the reviewer gave it a perfect five‑star rating, they provide no information about the audio quality or musical highlights.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review with a 5‑star rating but lacking any substantive commentary on performance or recording quality, so the rating is based primarily on the star count.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix, or source; reviewer only mentions that the file has not been uploaded yet.
